name: IDeal Jewelry & Loans
description_short: IDeal Jewelry & Loans is a credit repair provider based in Miami, Florida. Rated 4.8/5 with 61 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
IDeal Jewelry & Loans is a credit repair provider serving clients in Miami, Florida. Carrying a 4.8/5.0 Google rating from 61 reviews, IDeal Jewelry & Loans has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the Miami area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a coin dealer, electronics store, jewelry buyer, IDeal Jewelry & Loans provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Miami, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. IDeal Jewelry & Loans operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Miami, Florida area who are considering IDeal Jewelry & Loans should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
